body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The Discord overlay line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-DSC-001](task-0147): Event Subscriber

## Purpose

Implement Discord event subscriber.

## Scope

- Event format
- Subscription logic
- Processing

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement subscription
3. Add processing

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Subscription works
3. Processing works
